creator: jdferrell3@yahoo.com
text:
Attached is a shar of a new port, security/p5-Crypt-OpenSSL-AES.  The Crypt::OpenSSL::AES module implements a wrapper around OpenSSL's AES (Rijndael) library.


I tested with 'portlint' and followed the testing process outlined in the Porter's Handbook, so hopefully everything is in order.  Please let me know if there is anything I need to fix.


Thanks,
John

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
